data.name: 隨侍神側
data.detailed_description:
◆故事


父母染疫身亡後，作為外來者遺孤的紫藤就被村民們圈養著，當作十年一次獻給「凶神」的活祭品候補。
當獻祭的日子到來，被帶上神社的紫藤，看見的卻是此生最美的夕陽，以及滿臉憔悴卻毫無戾氣的凶神大人。

留在神社與凶神同住的紫藤，漸漸長大成人。
他將凶神大人──晴生，視為再生父母、更是人生中最重要的對象。
一次定期的探望與會面，卻讓一切變了調……
他們將會迎來什麼樣的結局呢？

◆玩法


閱讀文字劇情後，透過選項，決定少年──紫藤的行動，不同的選項將會導向不同的結局。
是否能讓他們擁有完滿的好結局，選擇全在於你。

◆遊戲特色


◇8張CG，2場H劇情
◇遊戲文字約7萬字
◇兩位主要男角，一位女性配角
◇感情向，訴說關於兩位男主角的感情糾葛
◇遊戲結局：9種結局，包含1種True End

data.short_description: 神明大人與祭品少年的感情故事，《隨侍神側》。 有著神秘過去的、居於深山的凶神大人，與身為外來者後裔而被選為祭品的孤兒少年。 兩者之間，將會有什麼情感糾葛？
data.supported_languages: 繁體中文, 英文, 俄文, 日文, 泰文, 簡體中文, 韓文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: WIN10/XP
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9 compatible graphics card
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 512 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: WIN10/XP
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9 compatible graphics card
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間

data.name: Kami-sama's Personal Servant
data.detailed_description:
◆Story


After the death of his parents, Shifuji, the orphan of an outsider, was kept in captivity by the villagers as a living sacrifice for the Fukichi na Kami once every ten years.
When the day of sacrifice arrived, Shifuji was brought to the shrine, only to see the most beautiful sunset of his life and haggard but not at all fierce Kami-sama.

Shifuji, who lived at the shrine with the Kami-sama, grew up to be a man.
He saw Haruo, the Fukichi na Kami-sama, as his new parent and the most important person in his life.
But a regular visit changed everything...
What would happen to them?

◆Gameplay Instructions


After reading the text storyline, you can decide the young man's actions – Shifuji – through the options. Different choices will lead to different endings.
It's up to you to decide whether or not to give them a happy ending.

◆Game Features


◇8 CGs, 2 sex scenes
◇Game text: 70,000
◇Two main male characters and one female side character
◇An emotional account of the relationship between the two male protagonists
◇Game endings: 9 types (including one True Ending)

data.short_description: The story of the relationship between a god and a young sacrificed boy, the Kami-sama's Personal Servant. A mysterious Fukichi na Kami (a god who brings bad luck) with a mysterious past who lived in the mountains and an orphan boy who was a descendant of an outsider and had been chosen as a sacrifice. What would happen between them?
data.supported_languages: Traditional Chinese, English, Russian, Japanese, Thai, Simplified Chinese, Korean
